title: lappula krylovii
intro: Lappula krylovii, also known as Krylov's lappula or Russian lappula, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family Boraginaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lappula krylovii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and even exhibit antitumor activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical treatment for skin conditions.
